blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 62°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: light drizzle, highs of 44°F, winds around 21 mph.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
